---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## 🐛 Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error '...'

## ✅ Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

What actually happened (include error messages, stack traces, etc.)

## 📱 Platform

- [ ] Web (browser: _Chrome / Firefox / Safari / Edge_)
- [ ] Mobile iOS (device: _iPhone 12 / iPad_)
- [ ] Mobile Android (device: _Pixel 6 / Samsung S21_)
- [ ] Desktop (_Windows / macOS / Linux_)

## 📦 App Version

- **Commit/Tag:** (e.g., `a3f9c2e` or `v1.0.0`)
- **Branch:** (e.g., `main`, `develop`)
- **Node.js version:** (check with `node --version`)
- **npm version:** (check with `npm --version`)

## 🖼️ Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings showing the bug.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem:
- Browser console errors
- Network tab errors
- Relevant logs
- Environment variables set
- Recent changes you made

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] I've checked existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I've tested on latest code (`git pull upstream main`)
- [ ] I've included steps to reproduce
- [ ] I've included error messages/logs
- [ ] I've filled in platform and app version
